pr.title: Non-Record: Bigram-Aware Context Modeling with Mixed-Precision Quantization (val_bpb: 1.1431)

output.summary: Injects bigram context via hash+gated blending and uses mixed int5/int6 quantization to fund a deeper 10-layer transformer under the 16MB cap.
techniques: - BigramHash and SmearGate inject local bigram signals into embeddings
- Mixed int5/int6 quantization reallocates budget to add a 10th transformer layer
- Sliding-window eval with stride 64 scores every token
